text:
association football club, sports club devoted to association football (soccer), also known as F.C., soccer club, football club, FC, association soccer club. Attributes include: 
- Commons category: "Association football clubs"
- subclass of: "sports club"
- sport: "association football"
- has part(s): "coaching staff",
 "association football team",
 "trademark",
 "association football player",
 "association football venue",
 "manager"
- different from: "association football team",
 "football team"
- properties for this type: "Swiss Football Association club number",
 "Estonian Football Association team ID",
 "Lega Serie A team ID",
 "country",
 "league or competition",
 "logo image",
 "official website",
 "located in the administrative territorial entity",
 "inception"
- model item: "Nea Salamis Famagusta FC (applies to use with property: instance of)",
 "Futbol Club Barcelona (applies to use with property: instance of)"
